title: Use of Petcoke
file_title: 492, 493, 494 dated 25.05.2018 use of petcoke in lime kiln.pdf
text: 2955 GI/2018 (1) jftLVªh laö Mhö ,yö&33004@99 REGD. NO. D. L.-33004/99 vlk/kj.k EXTRAORDINARY Hkkx II—[k.M 3—mi&[k.M (i) PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) izkf/dkj ls izdkf'kr PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY la- 349] ubZ fnYyh] 'kqØokj] ebZ 25] 2018@T;s’ 4 ] 1940 No. 349] NEW DELHI, FRIDAY, MAY 25, 2018/JYAISTHA 4, 1940 पया榁वरण पया榁वरण पया榁वरण पया榁वरण,,,, वन वन वन वन और और और और जलवायु जलवायु जलवायु जलवायु प琇रवत榁न प琇रवत榁न प琇रवत榁न प琇रवत榁न मं灴ालय मं灴ालय मं灴ालय मं灴ालय अिधसूचना अिधसूचना अिधसूचना अिधसूचना नई 琈द瀖ली, 25 मई, 2018 सा सा सा सा....का का का का....िन िन िन िन.... 492 492 492 492 ((((अअअअ).).).).— — — —रा瀠灩ीय राजधानी 楹े灴 (एनसीआर) रा榖य犘 म犆 पया榁वरण क琉 गुणव瀄ता के संर楹ण एवं सुधार और पया榁वरण 灹दूषण के िनवारण, िनयं灴ण तथा उपशमन के उ獴े瀙य से, राष्灩ीय राजधानी 楹े灴 रा榖य犘 म犆 पेटकोक क琉 िब灙琉 तथा 灹योग के संबंध म犆 उपाय 琈कये जाने क琉 आव瀙यकता है; और के瀈灶ीय सरकार ने पया榁वरण (संर楹ण) अिधिनयम, 1986 (1986 का 29) क琉 धारा 3 क琉 उपधारा (1) और (2) 獧ारा 灹द瀄त शि猴य犘 का 灹योग करते 牣ए, रा瀠灩ीय राजधानी 楹े灴 के रा榖य犘 म犆 चूना भ獉犘 म犆 पेटकोक क琉 िब灙琉 और 灹योग के िलए 琈दनांक 19 जनवरी, 2018 अिधसूचना सं榐या सा.का.िन. 45 (अ) (िजसे इसम犆 इसके प瀙चात् उ榉त अिधसूचना कहा गया है) जारी क琉 थी। और उ榉त अिधसूचना को जारी करने के बाद पया榁वरण, वन और जलवायु प琇रवत榁न मं灴ालय (िजसे इसम犆 इसके प瀙चात् मं灴ालय कहा गया है) म犆 अ瀒यावेदन 灹ा瀉त 牣ए ह犉 琈क अनु榀ात 灹योग के मामल犘 म犆 भी, 灹यो榉ता अिभकरण犘 獧ारा आयात नह牷 琈कया जा रहा है और आयात 灹ाय: सुिवधा 灹दाता猒 के मा瀇यम से 琈कया जा रहा है। और उ榉त अ瀒यावेदन犘 पर िवचार करने के बाद मं灴ालय का यह सुिवचा琇रत राय है 琈क उ榉त अिधसूचना के अधीन 灹यो榉ता क琉 सुिवधा के िलए उ瀈ह犆, उ榉त अिधसूचना के 灹ावधान犘 के अ瀇यधीन, सुिवधा 灹दाता猒 के मा瀇यम से आयात करने क琉 अनुमित दी जा सकती है। और रा瀠灩ीय राजधानी 楹े灴 (एनसीआर) के रा榖य犘 म犆 पेटकोक क琉 िब灙琉 और 灹योग के मामल犘 म犆 पारद琔श榁ता को बढ़ाने और िनगरानी को बेहतर बनाने क琉 भी आव瀙यकता है; और अब, के瀈灶ीय सरकार, पया榁वरण (संर楹ण) अिधिनयम, 1986 (1986 का 29) क琉 धारा 3 क琉 उपधारा (1) और उपधारा (2) 獧ारा 灹द瀄त शि猴य犘 का 灹योग करते 牣ए 琈दनांक 19 जनवरी, 2018 क琉 उ榉त अिधिसूचना सं榐या सा.का.िन. 45 (अ) म犆, एतद् 獧ारा, िन瀓निलिखत संशोधन करती है, अथा榁त्: - उ榉त अिधसूचना म犆, - -- 1 of 8 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] (i) िनदेश (1) म犆, ‘猆धन के 牲प म犆’ श瀑द犘 का लोप 琈कया जाएगा; (ii) िनदेश (8) म犆, िन瀓निलिखत पर瀈तुक अंत: 瀡थािपत 琈कया जाएगा, अथा榁त्: - “परंतु य琈द कोई पंजीकृत औ獸ोिगक इकाई अपनी ओर से पेटकोक का आयात करने के िलए तीसरे प楹कार को िनयु榉त करने क琉 इ榔छुक है तो उसे इसक琉 अनुमित दी जा सकती है, बशत犇 琈क – (क) ऐसा तीसरा प楹कार संबंिधत रा榖य 灹दूषण िनयं灴ण बोड榁 म犆 पंजीकृत हो; (ख) तीसरे प楹कार 獧ारा 琈कया जाने वाला आयात, िनदेश (2) मे उि瀖लिखतानुसार औ獸ोिगक इकाई क琉 वा瀡तिवक आव瀙यकता तक सीिमत हो और यह 琈कसी अ瀈य प楹कार को िब灙琉 के िलए न हो; (ग) ऐसा तीसरा प楹कार खंड (i) और (ii) के संदभ榁 म犆 सीमा शु瀖क 灹ािधकरण犘 को इस आशय क琉 घोषणा उ獣ोषणा 灹瀡तुत करे। (iii) िनदेश (11) के 瀡थान पर, िन瀓निलिखत िनदेश को 灹ित瀡थािपत 琈कया जाएगा, अथा榁त्: “(11) रा瀠灩ीय राजधानी 楹े灴 रा榖य犘 के 灹दूषण िनयं灴ण बोड榁, ऊपर 琈कए गए उ瀖लेख के अनुसार, सहमितय犘, पंजीकरण, तेल शोधन कारखान犘 獧ारा क琉 गई िब琈灙य犘 के 琇रकॉड榁 और औ獸ोिगक इकाइय犘 獧ारा 琈कए गए उपयोग के 琇रकाड榁 को अपलोड करने के िलए एक इले榉灩ॉिनक 琇रकाड榁 िस瀡टम बनाएंगे और उ榉त बोड榁 इन आंकड़犘 को पहले एक वष榁 तक मािसक आधार पर और उसके बाद 灴ैमािसक आधार पर के瀈灶ीय 灹दूषण िनयं灴ण बोड榁 के साथ साझा कर犆गे और रा榖य犘 के 灹दूषण िनयं灴ण बोड猀 से 灹ा瀉त होने के बाद इन आंकड़犘 को के瀈灶ीय 灹दूषण िनयं灴ण बोड榁 क琉 वेबससाइट पर दशा榁या जाएगा”। [फा. सं. 榉यू-16017/4/2018—सीपीए] 琇रतेश कुमार 琐संह, संयु榉त सिचव 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉पणणणण :::: मूल अिधसूचना भारत के राजप灴 म犆 琈दनांक 19 जनवरी, 2018 क琉 अिधसूचना सं. सा.का.िन. 45 (अ) के 獧ारा 灹कािशत क琉 गई थी। MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT, FOREST AND CLIMATE CHANGE NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 25th May, 2018 G.S.R. 492(E).—Whereas, with a view to protecting and improving the quality of environment and preventing, controlling and abating environmental pollution in the National Capital Region (NCR) States, there is a need to take measures relating to sale and use of pet coke in the NCR States; And Whereas, in exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (2) of section 3 of the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 (29 of 1986), the Central Government issued notification, published vide number G. S. R. 45 (E), dated the 19th January, 2018, for sale and use of pet coke in lime kiln in NCR States (hereinafter referred to as the said notification); And Whereas, subsequent to issuance of the said notification, the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change (hereinafter referred to as the Ministry) has received representations that even in cases of permitted use, imports are not undertaken by the user agencies and are usually sourced through import facilitators; And Whereas, the Ministry after considering the said representations is of the considered opinion that in order to facilitate the user under the said notification, they can be permitted to source through import facilitators subject to provisions of the said notification; And Whereas, there is further need for enhancing transparency and better monitoring with reference to sale and use of pet coke in the NCR States; Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (2) of section 3 of the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 (29 of 1986), the Central Government hereby makes the following amendments in the said notification number G. S. R. 45(E), dated the 19th January, 2018, namely: - -- 2 of 8 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(i)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 3 In the said notification, - (i) in direction (1), the words “as a fuel” shall be omitted; (ii) in direction (8), the following proviso shall be inserted, namely: - “Provided that in case, a registered industrial unit desires to engage a third party to import pet coke on its behalf, the same may be permitted, if- (a) such third party registers with the concerned State Pollution Control Board; (b) the import by the third party is limited to the actual requirement of the industrial unit as specified in direction (2) and not for sale to any other party; (c) such third party furnishes declaration with respect to clauses (i) and (ii) to the custom authorities.”; (iii) for direction (11), the following direction shall be substituted, namely:- “(11) The NCR States Pollution Control Boards shall develop an electronic record system for uploading of consents, registration, record of sales by oil refineries, and record of use by industrial units, as mentioned above and the said Boards shall share this data with the Central Pollution Control Board on a monthly basis for the first one year and thereafter on quarterly basis, and this data shall be published on the Central Pollution Control Board website on receipt from the States Pollution Control Boards”. [F. No. Q-16017/4/2018-CPA] RITESH KUMAR SINGH, Jt. Secy. और के瀈灶ीय सरकार ने पया榁वरण (संर楹ण) अिधिनयम, 1986 (1986 का 29) क琉 धारा 3 क琉 उपधारा (1) और (2) 獧ारा 灹द瀄त शि猴य犘 का 灹योग करते 牣ए, रा瀠灩ीय राजधानी 楹े灴 के रा榖य犘 के सीम犆ट संयं灴犘 म犆 पेटकोक क琉 िब灙琉 और 灹योग के िलए 琈दनांक 19 जनवरी, 2018 अिधसूचना सं榐या सा.का.िन. 46 (अ) (िजसे इसम犆 इसके प瀙चात् उ榉त अिधसूचना कहा गया है) जारी क琉 थी। और उ榉त अिधसूचना को जारी करने के बाद पया榁वरण, वन और जलवायु प琇रवत榁न मं灴ालय (िजसे इसम犆 इसके प瀙चात् मं灴ालय कहा गया है) म犆 अ瀒यावेदन 灹ा瀉त 牣ए ह犉 琈क अनु榀ेय 灹योग के मामल犘 म犆 भी, 灹यो榉ता अिभकरण犘 獧ारा आयात नह牷 琈कया जा रहा है और आयात 灹ाय: सुिवधा 灹दाता猒 के मा瀇यम से 琈कया जा रहा है। और उ榉त अ瀒यावेदन犘 पर िवचार करने के बाद मं灴ालय का यह सुिवचा琇रत राय है 琈क उ榉त अिधसूचना के अधीन 灹यो榉ता क琉 सुिवधा के िलए उ瀈ह犆, उ榉त अिधसूचना के 灹ावधान犘 के अ瀇यधीन, सुिवधा 灹दाता猒 के मा瀇यम से आयात करने क琉 अनुमित दी जा सकती है। और रा瀠灩ीय राजधानी 楹े灴 (एनसीआर) के रा榖य犘 म犆 पेटकोक क琉 िब灙琉 और 灹योग के मामल犘 म犆 पारद琔श榁ता को बढ़ाने और िनगरानी को बेहतर बनाने क琉 भी आव瀙यकता है; और अब, के瀈灶ीय सरकार, पया榁वरण (संर楹ण) अिधिनयम, 1986 (1986 का 29) क琉 धारा 3 क琉 उपधारा (1) और उपधारा (2) 獧ारा 灹द瀄त शि猴य犘 का 灹योग करते 牣ए, 琈दनांक 19 जनवरी, 2018 क琉 उ榉त अिधसूचना सं榐या सा.का.िन. 46 (अ) म犆, एतद獧ारा, िन瀓निलिखत संशोधन करती है, अथा榁त्: - उ榉त अिधसूचना म犆, - (i) िनदेश (1) म犆, ‘猆धन के 牲प म犆’ श瀑द犘 का लोप 琈कया जाएगा; -- 3 of 8 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] (ii) िनदेश (8) म犆, िन瀓निलिखत पर瀈तुक अंत:瀡थािपत 琈कया जाएगा, अथा榁त्:- “परंतु य琈द कोई पंजीकृत औ獸ोिगक इकाई अपनी ओर से पेटकोक का आयात करने के िलए तीसरे प楹कार को िनयु榉त करने क琉 इच्छुक है तो उसे इसक琉 अनुमित दी जा सकती है, बशत犇 琈क – (क) ऐसा तीसरा प楹कार संबंिधत रा榖य 灹दूषण िनयं灴ण बोड榁 म犆 पंजीकृत हो; (ख) तीसरे प楹कार 獧ारा 琈कया जाने वाला आयात, िनदेश (2) मे उि瀖लिखतानुसार औ獸ोिगक इकाई क琉 वा瀡तिवक आव瀙यकता तक सीिमत हो और यह 琈कसी अ瀈य प楹कार को िब灙琉 के िलए न हो; (ग) ऐसा तीसरा प楹कार खंड (i) और (ii) के संदभ榁 म犆 सीमा शु瀖क 灹ािधकरण犘 को इस आशय क琉 घोषणा उ獣ोषणा 灹瀡तुत करे। (iii) िनदेश (11) के 瀡थान पर, िन瀓निलिखत िनदेश को 灹ित瀡थािपत 琈कया जाएगा, अथा榁त्: “(11) रा瀠灩ीय राजधानी 楹े灴 रा榖य犘 के 灹दूषण िनयं灴ण बोड榁, ऊपर 琈कए गए उ瀖लेख के अनुसार, सहमितय犘, पंजीकरण, तेल शोधन कारखान犘 獧ारा क琉 गई िब琈灙य犘 के 琇रकॉड榁 और औ獸ोिगक इकाइय犘 獧ारा 琈कए गए उपयोग के 琇रकाड榁 को अपलोड करने के िलए एक इले榉灩ॉिनक 琇रकाड榁 िस瀡टम बनाएंगे और उ榉त बोड榁 इन आंकड़犘 को पहले एक वष榁 तक मािसक आधार पर और उसके बाद 灴ैमािसक आधार पर के瀈灶ीय 灹दूषण िनयं灴ण बोड榁 के साथ साझा कर犆गे और रा榖य犘 के 灹दूषण िनयं灴ण बोड猀 से 灹ा瀉त होने के बाद इन आंकड़犘 को के瀈灶ीय 灹दूषण िनयं灴ण बोड榁 क琉 वेबससाइट पर दशा榁या जाएगा”। [फा. सं. 榉यू-16017/4/2018—सीपीए] 琇रतेश कुमार 琐संह, संयु榉त सिचव 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉पणणणण :::: मूल अिधसूचना भारत के राजप灴 म犆 琈दनांक 19 जनवरी, 2018 क琉 अिधसूचना सं. सा.का.िन. 46 (अ) के 獧ारा 灹कािशत क琉 गई थी । NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 25th May, 2018 G.S.R. 493(E).—Whereas, with a view to protecting and improving the quality of environment and preventing, controlling and abating environmental pollution in the National Capital Region (NCR) States, there is a need to take measures relating to sale and use of pet coke in the NCR States; And Whereas, in exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (2) of section 3 of the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 (29 of 1986), the Central Government issued notification, published vide number G. S. R. 46 (E), dated the 19th January, 2018, for sale and use of pet coke in cement plant in NCR States (hereinafter referred to as the said notification); And Whereas, subsequent to issuance of the said notification, the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change (hereinafter referred to as the Ministry) has received representations that even in cases of permitted use, imports are not undertaken by the user agencies and are usually sourced through import facilitators; And Whereas, the Ministry after considering the said representations is of the considered opinion that in order to facilitate the user under the said notification, they can be permitted to source through import facilitators subject to provisions of the said notification; And Whereas, there is further need for enhancing transparency and better monitoring with reference to sale and use of pet coke in the NCR States; Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (2) of section 3 of the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 (29 of 1986), the Central overnment hereby makes the following amendments in the said notification number G. S. R. 46(E), dated the 19th January, 2018, namely: - In the said notification, - (i) in direction (1), the words “as a fuel” shall be omitted; (ii) in direction (8), the following proviso shall be inserted, namely: - “Provided that in case, a registered industrial unit desires to engage a third party to import pet coke on its behalf, the same may be permitted, if- -- 4 of 8 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(i)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 5 (a) such third party registers with the concerned State Pollution Control Board; (b) the import by the third party is limited to the actual requirement of the industrial unit as specified in direction (2) and not for sale to any other party; (c) such third party furnishes declaration with respect to clauses (i) and (ii) to the custom authorities.”; (d) for direction (11), the following direction shall be substituted, namely:- “(11) The NCR States Pollution Control Boards shall develop an electronic record system for uploading of consents, registration, record of sales by oil refineries, and record of use by industrial units, as mentioned above and the said Boards shall share this data with the Central Pollution Control Board on a monthly basis for the first one year and thereafter on quarterly basis, and this data shall be published on the Central Pollution Control Board website on receipt from the States Pollution Control Boards”. 獧ारा उपयोग के अिभलेख को अपलोड करने के िलए एक इलै榉灩ोिनक अिभलेख 灹णाली को िवकिसत कर犆गे और उ榉त बोड榁 पहले वष榁 म犆 इस जानकारी को मािसक आधार पर और त瀄प瀙चात 灴ैमािसक आधार पर के瀈灶ीय 灹दूषण िनयं灴ण बोड榁 के साथ शेयर 灹ािधकृितक 瀘यवहा琇रय犘 को, जो एनसीआर रा榖य犘 म犆 灹यो榉ता उ獸ोग犘 को िब灙琉 कर रहे ह犉, उपयु榁榉त िनदेश (4) के अनुसार उन रा榖य犘 के रा榖य 灹दूषण िनयं灴ण बोड猀 म犆 रिज瀡灩ीकरण कराना होगा, जहां अंितम 灹यो榉ता रह रहे ह犉 और वे इस बात को सुिनि玑त कर犆गे 琈क िब琈灙यां उपयु榁榉त (5) और (6) म犆 琈दये गये िनदेश犘 के अनुसार ह犘 और वे उपयु榁榉त िनदेश (9) के अनुसार 灴ैमािसक 琇रपोट榁 उस रा榖य के रा榖य 灹दूषण िनयं灴ण बोड榁 को फाइल कर犆गे, जहां अंितम 灹यो榉ता रहते ह犉। 2. यह अिधसूचना राजप灴 म犆 灹काशन क琉 तारीख को 灹वृ瀄त होगी। [फा. सं. 榉यू-16017/4/2018-सीपीए] 琇रतेश कुमार 琐संह, संयु榉त सिचव -- 6 of 8 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(i)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 7 NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 25th May, 2018 G.S.R. 494(E).—Whereas, with a view to protecting and improving the quality of environment and preventing, controlling and abating environmental pollution in the National Capital Region (NCR) States, there is a need to take measures relating to sale and use of pet coke in the NCR States; And Whereas, the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change (hereinafter referred to as the Ministry) has received representations with reference to sale, use and import of petcoke indicating the even in cases of permitted use, imports are not undertaken by the user agencies and are usually sourced through import facilitators; And Whereas, the Ministry after considering the said representations is of considered opinion that in order to facilitate the user under this notification, they can be permitted to source through import facilitators subject to the provisions of this notification; Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (2) of section 3 of the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 (29 of 1986), the Central Government hereby issues the following directions, namely:- Sale and use of pet coke in NCR States for carbide manufacturing industry using fuel grade pet coke wherein it is used in the manufacturing process and not as a fuel: - (1) The carbide manufacturing industry consuming pet coke in the process shall not operate in NCR States without obtaining the consent of and registration with the concerned State Pollution Control Board. (2) Consent issued by the concerned State Pollution Control Board shall clearly specify the quantity for the process permitted per month and per annum vis-à-vis products produced per month and per annum. (3) Industrial unit shall not be permitted to store pet coke for more than its three month’s consumption. (4) All producers or refineries, their authorised dealers and users of pet coke in NCR States, shall be registered with the concerned State Pollution Control Board. (5) Refineries and their authorised dealers shall sell pet coke to only consented and registered industrial units in the NCR States according to the quantity permitted in the consent issued by the concerned State Pollution Control Board. (6) Sale of pet coke by producers or refineries shall be in maximum two steps, from refinery-to-industry or from refinery-to-authorised dealer-to-industry. (7) Only consented and registered industrial units of NCR States shall be permitted to directly import pet coke and consignment shall be in the name of user industrial units for their own use only. (8) Import of pet coke for the purpose of trading shall not be permitted in NCR States: Provided that in case a registered industrial unit desires to engage a third party to import pet coke on its behalf, the same may be permitted, if- (a) such third party registers with the concerned State Pollution Control Board; (b) the import by the third party is limited to the actual requirement of the industrial unit as specified in direction (2) and not for sale to any other party; (c) such third party furnishes declaration with respect to clauses (a) and (b) to the custom authorities. (9) Producers or refineries and their authorised dealers shall submit details of pet coke produced and sold to end user industrial units during the month, and opening and closing stock to the concerned State Pollution Control Board on quarterly basis. (10) All end user industrial units, including oil refineries, shall submit details of pet coke from different sources during the month (self-produced, imported, purchased from refineries or authorised dealers), quantity consumed during the month, and opening and closing stock to the concerned State Pollution Control Board on quarterly basis. (11) The NCR States Pollution Control Boards shall develop an electronic record system for uploading of consents, registration, record of sales by oil refineries, and record of use by industrial units, as mentioned above and the -- 7 of 8 -- 8 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] said Boards shall share this data with the Central Pollution Control Board on a monthly basis for the first one year and thereafter on quarterly basis, and this data shall be published on the Central Pollution Control Board website on receipt from the State Pollution Control Board. (12) Industrial units in NCR States shall source pet coke only from producers or refineries and their authorised dealers and they shall not source these products from any other intermediaries even when they are located outside the NCR States. (13) For producers or refineries and their authorised dealers in non NCR States who are making sales to user industries in NCR States, such producers or refineries shall have to be registered with the State Pollution Control Board of the States where the end users reside in accordance with direction (4) above and they shall ensure that the sales are as per the directions (5) and (6) above, and they shall file quarterly reports to the State Pollution Control Board of the State where the end users reside in accordance with direction (9) above. 2. This notification shall come into force on the date of its publication in the Official Gazette. [F.No. Q-16017/4/2018-CPA] RITESH KUMAR SINGH, Jt. Secy.
